---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.04
    center: false
    transition: none
    background-transition: none
    slide-number: false
    progress: true
    controls: true
    controls-layout: edges
    hash: true
    css: styles.css
---

## {.title}

<div class="title-center">
  <div class="deck-title">Cognitive Biases &amp; <span class="flow">Heuristics</span></div>
  <div class="title-author">Anissa Chan</div>
</div>

## Anchoring Effect

<div class="two-col slide-grid">
  <div class="col left-col">
    <div class="image-card anchor-card">
      <img src="assets/anchoring-cars.png" alt="Anchoring effect car illustration">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col right-col">
    <div class="content-block">
      <div class="section-label">What is it?</div>
      <div class="body-copy">Overreliance on first information seen.</div>

      <div class="section-label accent">Seen in Data Analysis</div>
      <div class="body-copy">- Updated information is neglected</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Confirmation Bias

<div class="two-col slide-grid confirmation-grid">
  <div class="col left-col">
    <div class="content-block">
      <div class="section-label">What is it?</div>
      <div class="body-copy">Tendency to ignore information that does not affirm preset beliefs</div>

      <div class="section-label accent">Seen in Data Analysis</div>
      <div class="body-copy">Experiments are ran to confirm beliefs<br>New ideas passed over</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col right-col">
    <div class="image-card venn-card">
      <img src="assets/confirmation-venn.png" alt="Confirmation bias venn diagram">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## {.image-only-slide}

<div class="photo-collage">
  <div class="image-card blueberry-card"><img src="assets/confirmation-blueberries.jpeg" alt="Blueberries"></div>
  <div class="image-card gif-card"><img src="assets/confirmation-typing.gif" alt="Typing gif"></div>
</div>

## Availability heuristic

<div class="two-col slide-grid availability-grid">
  <div class="col left-col">
    <div class="image-stack">
      <div class="image-card availability-cartoon"><img src="assets/availability-cartoon.png" alt="Availability heuristic cartoon"></div>
      <div class="image-card availability-table"><img src="assets/availability-table.png" alt="Shark bite table"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col right-col">
    <div class="content-block availability-copy">
      <div class="section-label">What is it?</div>
      <div class="body-copy">Tendency to rely on memorable ideas and events</div>

      <div class="section-label accent">Seen in Data Analysis</div>
      <div class="body-copy">Overemphasize information that is more memorable<br>Ignoring information that is less memorable</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## {.band-slide}

<div class="single-word">Conclusion</div>
<div class="bottom-photo"><img src="assets/bottom-photo.jpg" alt=""></div>

## Sources {.sources-slide}

<div class="sources-wrap">
  <p>https://www.floridamuseum.ufl.edu/shark-attacks/yearly-worldwide-summary/</p>
  <p>https://www.pon.harvard.edu/tag/anchoring-effect/</p>
  <p>https://lpsonline.sas.upenn.edu/features/cognitive-bias-and-data-how-human-psychology-impacts-data-interpretatio</p>
  <p>https://oxford-review.com/the-oxford-review-dei-diversity-equity-and-inclusion-dictionary/confirmation-bias-definition-and-explanation/ </p>
</div>
<div class="bottom-photo"><img src="assets/bottom-photo.jpg" alt=""></div>
